title: fumaria parviflora subsp. vaillantii
intro: Fumaria parviflora subsp. vaillantii, also known as Vaillant's Fumitory, is a subspecies of the annual flowering plant Fumaria parviflora. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which are believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are thought to help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. While more research is needed to fully understand its effects, Vaillant's Fumitory has been traditionally used to support overall health and well-being.
